title: PutenvAdapter::write doesn't update $_ENV, causing getenv()/$_ENV mismatch
body: PutenvAdapter::write() calls putenv("$name=$value") but never touches $_ENV or $_SERVER. Code that reads via getenv() sees the new value immediately, but code reading $_ENV['NAME'] still sees the old (or missing) value, which is confusing for consumers mixing both access styles.

title: Parser doesn't support multiple exported vars on one line
body: A .env line like 'export FOO=bar BAZ=qux' (multiple assignments after a single export keyword) is not split into two entries by src/Parser/Parser.php; it's treated as one malformed entry instead.

title: Behavior of combining createImmutable and createMutable in the same request is undocumented
body: We call Dotenv::createMutable() in one bootstrap file and later Dotenv::createImmutable()->safeLoad() in a shared library, both against the same .env. Dotenv.php doesn't document what happens to already-set variables when a second loader with different mutability runs afterward.

title: ApacheAdapter usage prerequisites aren't documented
body: src/Repository/Adapter/ApacheAdapter.php clearly targets mod_php/apache_getenv setups, but there's no comment or doc explaining when this adapter actually gets selected over PutenvAdapter, or what happens if apache_setenv isn't available.

title: Escaped dollar sign inside double-quoted value is mishandled
body: A .env entry like FOO="price: \$5" should produce the literal string 'price: $5', but src/Parser/EntryParser.php appears to treat \$ as a variable interpolation marker rather than an escaped literal dollar sign in double-quoted values.
